session.assistant:
## Summary
**Exit Code:** 2 (failure)
**Root Cause:** Prettier formatting issues in 2 files: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Output Details:**
The `make fast-ci` command failed during the Prettier check stage. The output shows:
``` Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ```
**Passing Checks:** - Linting: All checks passed - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK - AGENTS.md standards: PASSED - Unit tests (erk): 5905 passed in 25.18s - Unit tests (erk-dev): 138 passed in 5.90s - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 123 passed in 0.85s - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 50 passed in 0.95s
**Failing Check:** - Prettier format check: 2 files have code style issues
The issue is that two markdown documentation files need to be reformatted to match the Prettier style standard. The error indicates running Prettier with the `--write` flag would fix the formatting issues.
